from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional


class UserService:
    def __init__(self, db_url: str):
        self.db_url = db_url
        self._engine = None
        self._connection = None

    def connect(self):
        from sqlalchemy import create_engine
        self._engine = create_engine(self.db_url)
        self._connection = self._engine.connect()

    def get_users(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        if self._connection is None:
            self.connect()
        return self._connection.execute("SELECT * FROM users").fetchall()


class DataPipeline:
    def __init__(self, source_url: str, session: Optional[Any] = None):
        self.source_url = source_url
        self.session = session
        self._data = None

    def fetch(self):
        if self.session is None:
            import requests
            self.session = requests.Session()
        response = self.session.get(self.source_url)
        self._data = response.json()
        return self._data

    def process(self):
        if self._data is None:
            self.fetch()
        return [self._transform(item) for item in self._data]
